_comment: Run ClaudeComms as a Claude Code CHANNEL (research preview) WITHOUT installing the plugin. Replace <ABSOLUTE-PATH-TO> with the absolute path to this repo's plugins/claude-comms, add this server to your project or user .mcp.json, then launch: `claude --dangerously-load-development-channels --channels server:claude-comms-channel`. COMMS_CHANNEL_MODE=1 makes launch.py run channel_bridge.py (native notifications/claude/channel delivery) instead of the FastMCP bridge. See docs/CHANNELS.md. If you HAVE installed the plugin, you don't need this file — use `--channels plugin:claude-comms@claude-comms` with COMMS_CHANNEL_MODE=1 instead.
